sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ يُوسُفُ إِلَى الدُّكَّانِ لِيَشْتَرِيَ الخُبْزَ وَالحَلِيبَ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je otišao u prodavnicu da kupi hljeb i mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf went to the shop to buy bread and milk.

sentences.translation: Pitao je za cijenu i platio gotovinom.
sentences.translationEn: He asked about the price and paid with cash.
The seller gave him the change.

sentences.arabic: شَكَرَ يُوسُفُ البَائِعَ وَخَرَجَ مِنَ الدُّكَّانِ.
sentences.translation: Jusuf je zahvalio prodavaču i izašao iz prodavnice.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf thanked the seller and left the shop.
